hero.title: LiveBoard API
hero.description: A professional trade analytics platform. Ingest fills, fund movements, FX rates, and instrument definitions via a simple REST API. Compute PnL, risk metrics, equity curves, and strategy attribution — all server-side.

quickstart.title: Quickstart
quickstart.step1Desc: Create an account. An admin must approve your account before you can use the API.
quickstart.step2Desc: From the API Keys page, generate a key. It starts with lbk_.
quickstart.step3Desc: A series is a logical grouping of trades (e.g., a live account or a simulation).
quickstart.step4Desc: Ingest instruments, FX rates, fund movements, and fills. Metrics are computed automatically.
quickstart.step5Desc: Open the web UI to see equity curves, drawdown, Sharpe ratio, and per-trade stats.

series.title: Series
series.desc: A logical book — live account, simulation, or backtest. All trades belong to a series.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.desc: A named trading approach (e.g. 'momentum-equity'). Strategies are auto-created from fill data.

instrument.title: Instrument
instrument.desc: A traded symbol with asset class, multiplier, and currency. Register before posting fills.

fill.title: Fill
fill.desc: A single execution — buy or sell, with qty, price, fees, and timestamp. The core unit of data.

ingestion.title: Data Ingestion
ingestion.createSeries: Create a new series. Returns a series_id used in all subsequent ingestion calls.
ingestion.registerInstruments: Register instruments for a series. Each instrument has a symbol, asset class (future/crypto/fx/equity), multiplier, and currency. Must be posted before fills reference them.
ingestion.postFxRates: Post foreign exchange rates for currency conversion. Each entry has ccy_from, ccy_to, a timestamp, and a rate. Required for multi-currency portfolios.
ingestion.postFundMovements: Post capital flows: deposits, withdrawals, and inter-strategy transfers. Used to compute capital base and indexed returns.
ingestion.postFills: Post fills in batch — the primary data ingestion endpoint. Each fill has a unique client_fill_id for idempotency, strategy, symbol, side, quantity, price, fees, and a UTC timestamp. Fills are paired with the latest instrument registration for multiplier and currency lookup.
ingestion.getFills: Query fills for a series with optional strategy, date range, and pagination. Returns individual fill records with timestamps and PnL components.

endpoints.listSeries: List series with strategies, summary stats (PnL, capital, last ingest)
endpoints.deleteFillsByStrategy: Void all fills for a strategy. ?strategy=name&date_from=&date_to=
endpoints.postBenchmark: Post benchmark NAV series for beta/alpha
endpoints.compare: Compare 2+ series/strategies (level=account|strategy, strategy_keys, metrics + equity curves)
endpoints.createShare: Create a share link for a series (optional expires_in_days)
endpoints.listShares: List active share links for a series
endpoints.viewShared: Public view of a shared series (no auth)
